---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability (feature family, acquisition effect, statistic)
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What and why

What should the library be able to do, and what research question does it serve?

## Definition and reference

If this is a new IBSI feature family or a statistic, link its definition and any
reference values it should be validated against. New features must be validated
against an external oracle, not just self-consistency.

## Scope

- Does it fit the constraints (pure Python; `numpy`/`scipy`/`scikit-image`;
  deterministic; no patient data)?
- Which module would it live in?
